---
name: Feature request / 功能建议
about: Suggest a civil, BIM, geotechnical, or tunnel monitoring feature / 提出土木、BIM、岩土或隧道监测功能
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / 问题

What engineering workflow or pain point should this solve?  
这个功能要解决什么工程流程或痛点？

## Proposed feature / 功能建议

Describe the desired behavior.  
请描述你希望看到的行为。

## Data involved / 涉及数据

Examples: monitoring CSV, IFC, AGS, borehole logs, TBM logs, FEM results.  
示例：监测 CSV、IFC、AGS、钻孔记录、TBM 日志、有限元结果。

## Acceptance criteria / 验收标准

- [ ] The feature is documented. / 功能已有文档说明。
- [ ] Sample data or a demo scenario is included. / 包含样例数据或演示场景。
- [ ] The output is explainable to an engineer. / 输出结果对工程师可解释。
